hero_lede: UK importer, manufacturing partner, and foodservice distributor for authentic East Asian ingredients. 30+ heritage brands, a family farm in Thailand, and 3,000+ product lines in stock.
story_h2: A family business with Asia in its bones.
story_lead: Founded in 1989 by Jimmy Chua, Chuanglee is today led by siblings Christopher, Jennisa and Katriya — a family rooted in food, in trade, and in the long, patient work of building real partnerships on both sides of the world.
story_p2: From a small importing operation in London, we have grown into a fully integrated supply partner: working directly with manufacturers across Thailand, China, Malaysia and Vietnam to bring authentic, consistent, scalable ingredients into UK kitchens — from independent operators to restaurant groups of 50+ sites and Michelin-starred establishments.
story_p3: We supply ambient, chilled, frozen and fresh categories — full-basket, direct-into-kitchen, with our own fleet servicing London and Greater London multiple times a week.
story_quote: Partnerships sit at the very core of what we do. We don't just import ingredients — we import the people, the recipes, and the standards behind them.
cap_intro: Five interconnected capabilities — sourcing, manufacturing, farming, distribution and technical support — wrapped into a single, reliable partnership. We solve real operational pain-points so kitchens can focus on what kitchens do best.

capabilities.title: Long-term partnerships across Asia.
capabilities.desc: Stable sourcing and consistent product supply through deep manufacturer relationships built across decades — not transactions.

capabilities.title: Ambient, chilled, frozen, fresh.
capabilities.desc: Delivered across London nationwide. Own fleet servicing London & Greater London with delivery direct into your kitchens.

capabilities.title: Sourcing, alternatives, development.
capabilities.desc: Operational support for evolving menus and scalable product development.

capabilities.title: Manufactured to your recipe in Thailand.
capabilities.desc: Through our manufacturing partner NRF: ready-to-use sauces and components, scalable for multi-site groups.

capabilities.title: Suree's Farm — fresh Thai herbs grown by our family.
capabilities.desc: A family-run vegetable farm and packing house one hour outside Bangkok in Chachoengsao, supplying seasonal Thai herbs and vegetables flown weekly into the UK.

eco_h2: From manufacturer to menu, fully integrated.

ecosystem.title: Asian Manufacturers
ecosystem.desc: Long-term supplier relationships across Thailand and Asia.

ecosystem.title: NRF Product Development
ecosystem.desc: Global expertise for private label and foodservice products.

ecosystem.title: Manufacturing — Thailand
ecosystem.desc: Scalable sauces and ready-to-use components, tailored to recipe.

ecosystem.title: Import & Logistics
ecosystem.desc: UK import management, consolidation and supply planning.

ecosystem.title: UK Warehouse & Distribution
ecosystem.desc: Ambient, chilled, frozen and fresh — across London and nationwide.

farm_h2: Granny Suree's herbs, on a plane every week.
farm_p: One hour outside Bangkok, our family farm and packing house grows organic Thai produce alongside trusted local farmers — packed to order, flown to the UK weekly.
farm_quote: Family farms it, family packs it, family delivers it.
cust_h2: Trusted by the kitchens shaping British dining.
cust_intro: From Michelin-starred dining rooms to multi-site groups, university caterers and our wholesale partners — Chuanglee operates as the back-of-house sourcing arm for some of the most ambitious East Asian food brands in the UK.
heritage_intro: What began as a small London importing business in 1989 is now a fully integrated foodservice ecosystem — but the philosophy hasn't changed: family-run, partnership-led, slow to commit, long to stay.

timeline.event: Chuanglee founded by Jimmy Chua. Begins importing East Asian ingredients into the UK.
Chuanglee Cash & Carry acquired — expanding wholesale reach.
Joins NRF Group; acquires Chinese foodservice business — full ecosystem formed.
First Mini C Asian Pantry retail store opens in Greenwich, London.
Multi-site ordering app launches. Revenue reaches £25M with 450+ customers.
The next generation continues the work — same family, same standards.

app_desc: Built for multi-site restaurant management. Personalised pricing, order guides tied to each site, repeat ordering in seconds, real-time delivery tracking and full account control — purpose-built for the pace of professional kitchens.
